description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a contrast round ribbed neck, short sleeves with contrast ribbed cuffs and distressed graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron on reverse; do not iron on decorationsDon that sporty look and gear up for the challenge with the spirit of the Irish football team with this T-shirt from locomotive.
